title: glyceria distans var. miliacea
intro: Glyceria distans var. miliacea, also known as Miliacea mannagrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. It has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to make herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
